visa_type_detail.name: Highly skilled migrant
requirements: You meet the general requirements that apply to everyone.
You have an employment contract with an employer or research institution in the Netherlands. This employer is a sponsor recognised by the IND.
You meet the income requirements. The agreed salary is in line with the market rate.

If you are going to work in individual healthcare and practise a medical profession that is listed in Article 3 and Article 36a of the Individual Healthcare Professions Act (BIG Act), you must be registered in the BIG register.

If you have a recognised foreign diploma and first have to work for 3 months under the supervision of a BIG-registered healthcare provider in the same profession, you must be in the BIG register with a conditional registration.

visa_type_detail.name: Intra corporate transferee
visa_type_detail.description: To work in the Netherlands as an intra corporate transferee (manager, specialist or trainee) transferred from a company located outside the EU.
